sections.paragraph:
Original: כּרוּב

Transliteration: kerûb

Phonetic: ker-oob'

BDB Definition:

Cherub = "blessing"
  1. an apparent exilic settlement in Babylonia from which some persons of doubtful extraction returned with Zerubbabel

Origin: the same as H3742

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
